dialogue.speaker: Frankenstein
dialogue.line: You may stand.

dialogue.speaker: Master
dialogue.line: Yes, Sir.

dialogue.speaker: Frankenstein
dialogue.line: Master, how have you been?

dialogue.speaker: Master
dialogue.line: I awoke only recently. What? How long have I slumbered?

dialogue.speaker: Frankenstein
dialogue.line: We don't know when you began your slumber, but it has been 820 years since we last saw you.

dialogue.speaker: Master
dialogue.line: 820 years.

dialogue.speaker: Frankenstein
dialogue.line: It was due to our incompetence that we were unable to locate you after you disappeared. My deepest apologies, Sir.

dialogue.speaker: Master
dialogue.line: I have been asleep for a long time.

dialogue.speaker: Master
dialogue.line: 820 years.

dialogue.speaker: Frankenstein
dialogue.line: To think that he has been slumbering for so long ever since he went missing, to awaken only now.

dialogue.speaker: Frankenstein
dialogue.line: Not just a few, but hundreds of years. I must investigate everything, down to how he ended up awakening here.

dialogue.speaker: Frankenstein
dialogue.line: This is called 'tea'.

dialogue.speaker: Frankenstein
dialogue.line: How are you adjusting to the language here? I cannot help but be concerned, since you have been asleep for so long.

dialogue.speaker: Master
dialogue.line: Sir, there are no problems regarding my abilities. As always, I will adjust soon enough.

dialogue.speaker: Frankenstein
dialogue.line: That is a relief to hear, Sir.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: HM?

dialogue.speaker: Frankenstein
dialogue.line: He must have chosen the most common attire in order to avoid any attention after his slumber. But of all things...

dialogue.speaker: Frankenstein
dialogue.line: I brought a transfer student.

dialogue.speaker: Master
dialogue.line: Transfer student?

dialogue.speaker: Master
dialogue.line: The Gatekeeper was quite impressive.

dialogue.speaker: Frankenstein
dialogue.line: Gatekeeper???

dialogue.speaker: Master
dialogue.line: Have you been leading a new family since we have last seen each other? Kek.

dialogue.speaker: Frankenstein
dialogue.line: No, Sir. This is a place called 'school' where we teach various things to children and guide them.

dialogue.speaker: Master
dialogue.line: School?

dialogue.speaker: Master
dialogue.line: I also have many things to learn about this modern world, which seems to have changed much.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: CLATTER

dialogue.speaker: Frankenstein
dialogue.line: I shall prepare so that you experience no difficulties in your adjustment, Master.

summary: The Master awakens after 820 years of slumber and learns about the vast changes in the world from his loyal subordinate, Frankenstein. Frankenstein introduces him to 'tea' and 'school', while the Master expresses a desire to learn about the modern world.
